interpretation_v0.scope: Exploratory same-section comparison. Scores and weights are temporary and intended to expose useful signals.
interpretation_v0.important_caution: Exact page layout matches alone are not proof of document reuse; they must be interpreted together with table, text, graphic, and domain-specific signals.
